title: Narrative State
description: A snapshot of the current narrative state for a live scene session. Stored in DynamoDB and pushed to all participants via WebSocket when it changes.

session_id.description: The active session ID this narrative state belongs to

scene_plan_id.description: The ScenePlan this session is running

current_state_id.description: ID of the current narrative state (references ScenePlan.narrative_states[].id)

current_state_name.description: Human-readable name of the current state (denormalised for display)

fired_hooks.description: History of GM hooks fired in this session, in order

fired_by.description: GM user ID who fired this hook

completed_objectives.description: Objective IDs completed so far in this session

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last state change

updated_by.description: User ID (GM or system) who last changed the state
